# InstalledApplicationListCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to get a list of the installed apps on a device.

## Declaration

```swift
object InstalledApplicationListCommand
```

## Objects

- **InstalledApplicationListCommand.Command**: The command to get a list of the installed apps on a device.

## Commands and responses

- **InstalledApplicationListResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to get a list of the installed apps on a device.
